scripts.test: npm run build && npx ts-node tests/test_compliance.ts
scripts.test:extended: npm run build && npx ts-node tests/integration/verify_api_contract.ts && npx ts-node tests/integration/verify_fail_safe.ts && npx ts-node tests/integration/verify_hardening.ts
scripts.healthcheck: npm run build && npx ts-node tests/integration/healthcheck_mcp.ts
scripts.verify-all: npm run build && npm run test && npm run test:extended && npm run healthcheck
